description_long: This is a modern flat-screen television with a large, rectangular display and a slim profile. The front features a wide, glossy screen bordered by a thin black bezel, and the display shows a vivid landscape image. The television is supported by a sturdy, rectangular black stand that provides stability. The back panel is matte black with visible mounting points and a central cable management system, which includes a white cable routed neatly. The sides reveal the ultra-thin depth of the screen, emphasizing its contemporary design. The overall appearance is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for both residential and commercial urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern flat-screen television with a thin black bezel, glossy display, and a sturdy black stand. The back features a cable management system and mounting points.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ultra-thin profile of the television and the cable management system at the back.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the large, glossy screen with a thin black bezel and the supporting stand.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the slimness of the television and the cable routing at the rear.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the matte black back panel, mounting points, and the cable management system.
attribute_bezel_design: Thin black plastic bezel with a glossy finish and minimalistic styling.
